corrections.note: The body begins with the tail end of a word from the previous line on the page; the scan clearly reads σασαντο, not σαντο.
Accent placement is unclear; likely should be ἐπἐγίνωσκον as printed, but low confidence.
The scan reads αὐτοῦ, not αὐτῷ.

corrections.location: main apparatus text, line with travel to Media
corrections.note: The scan clearly has ἐχόμην, not ἠρχόμην.
The siglum is the numeral 1, not superscript alpha.
No question mark is printed after Aᵃ in the scan.

uncertain.note: Accenting of ἐπἐγίνωσκον/ἐπεγίνωσκον is difficult to judge from the scan; likely no correction needed if accents are normalized conservatively.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; one clear omission at page start. Apparatus mostly correct, with a few clear misreadings in the main apparatus text and sigla.
